mapper.select: SELECT n.admin_notice_id, n.notice_title, n.notice_content, n.created_at, n.updated_at, n.notice_type, u.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name FROM admin_notice n JOIN user u ON n.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY n.created_at DESC;

SELECT n.admin_notice_id, n.notice_title, n.notice_content, n.created_at, n.updated_at, n.notice_type, u.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name FROM admin_notice n JOIN user u ON n.user_id = u.user_id WHERE admin_notice_id = #{adminNoticeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_notice (notice_title, notice_content, notice_type, user_id) VALUES (#{noticeTitle},#{noticeContent},#{noticeType} ,#{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_notice SET notice_title = #{noticeTitle},notice_type = #{noticeType}, notice_content = #{noticeContent} WHERE admin_notice_id = #{adminNoticeId}
